summary: Implemented UI regression Batch 4 for Home protocol template archive/restore management. Added a deterministic debug-only Home protocol template seed, stable protocol archive/restore accessibility identifiers, HomeProtocolRegression, and make ui-regression DOMAIN=home. The regression opens Home, verifies the seeded template is active, archives it through the explicit protocol-level archive affordance, verifies it moves to Archived Protocols, restores it, and verifies it returns active.

validations_failed.reason: Initial harness attempt could not find the archived-row Restore affordance because the archived row accessibility identifier collapsed child controls.
validations_failed.remediation: Marked the archived protocol row as an accessibility container so the row remains identifiable while the Restore button remains targetable.

validations_failed.reason: A retry reused a previous failed app process with archived state, so the seed hook did not get a fresh active-template launch.
validations_failed.remediation: Scoped app.terminate() to HomeProtocolRegression.launch(arguments:) so this deterministic fixture always relaunches before seeding.

contract_status_changes.contract: Home protocol template archive/restore UI regression
contract_status_changes.before: Home protocol archive/restore behavior had domain/store coverage and product affordance docs, but no maintained Lane 2 XCUITest regression.
contract_status_changes.after: HomeProtocolRegression covers one seeded protocol template moving active -> archived -> active through visible Home UI affordances. make ui-regression DOMAIN=home runs this class, and bare make ui-regression includes it with the other Lane 2 regression batches.

residual_risks: This slice proves protocol template archive/restore management only. It does not prove per-step archive because no per-step archive model exists.
This slice does not prove protocol schedule labels, active-run lifecycle, step revert, or broad Home regression behavior.
This slice does not add screenshot, device, or TestFlight proof for Home protocol archive/restore.
No next Lane 2 regression surface is selected yet.
recommended_next_reason: The supervisor queue has no eligible queued slice after this Batch 4 implementation. Future UI regression expansion should start with a new triage slice for one named surface.
